Package com.hathor.hathorback.Servicios.Usuario.Benchmark.BenchmarkReferencia.Repository

Interface IRepositoryBenchmarkReferencia

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<BenchmarkReferencia>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>
@Repository public interface IRepositoryBenchmarkReferencia extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<BenchmarkReferencia,Integer>

  • Method Details

    • findByKpi_CodigoAndTropico

      List<BenchmarkReferencia> findByTropico(String tropico)

    • findBenchmarkCombinado

      @Query(" SELECT b FROM BenchmarkReferencia b\n WHERE b.kpi.idKpi = :idKpi\n AND (\n (b.region = :region AND b.tropico = :tropico)\n OR (b.region = :region AND b.tropico IS NULL)\n OR (b.region IS NULL AND b.tropico = :tropico)\n OR (b.region = \'NACIONAL\')\n )\n") List<BenchmarkReferencia> findBenchmarkCombinado(@Param("idKpi") int idKpi, @Param("region") String region, @Param("tropico") String tropico)

    • findMasEspecifico

      @Query("SELECT b FROM BenchmarkReferencia b\nWHERE b.kpi.codigo = :codigoKpi\n AND (b.tropico IS NULL OR b.tropico = :tropico)\n AND (b.escala IS NULL OR b.escala = :escala)\n AND (b.region IS NULL OR b.region = :region OR b.region = \'NACIONAL\')\nORDER BY\n CASE\n WHEN b.tropico = :tropico AND b.region = :region AND b.escala = :escala THEN 1\n WHEN b.tropico = :tropico AND b.escala = :escala AND b.region IS NULL THEN 2\n WHEN b.tropico = :tropico AND b.region = :region AND b.escala IS NULL THEN 3\n WHEN b.tropico = :tropico AND b.region IS NULL AND b.escala IS NULL THEN 4\n WHEN b.tropico IS NULL AND b.escala = :escala THEN 5\n ELSE 6\n END ASC\nLIMIT 1\n") Optional<BenchmarkReferencia> findMasEspecifico(@Param("codigoKpi") String codigoKpi, @Param("tropico") String tropico, @Param("region") String region, @Param("escala") String escala)
